text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm out shopping on my day off,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober comes bursting out<n>from a very
crowded store.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I failed again. I was soclose to getting that fragrance oil too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's it to you?
choice_data_list: Were you trying to buy something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah, um, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why do you care? It's nothing<n>important
anyway, so I'm going to call<n>it a day and go
back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What's with you? In case you didn't<n>hear me
the first time, I'm done here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It looks like I won't be able to buy hera present after all... Sigh...
choice_data_list: Steel yourself and plow on through!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, one of my relatives has been<n>really
burnt out lately. I thought getting<n>her some
fragrance oil would be a<n>good pick-me-up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But the store is packed today<n>because there's a
sale going on. I<n>can't make any headway at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I need to head back soon, though...<n>What should I
do...
choice_data_list: Steel yourself and plow on through!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? "Get<n>something else?"
Who asked you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Get something else... I never<n>thought to do
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Come to think of it, she really<n>loves Mont
Blanc.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's not as if I'm taking your<n>advice. I
just happened to remember<n>that about her...
Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What would cheer her up... She<n>seemed to love
the Mont Blanc I made<n>for her last time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That might just work! It's important<n>to try and
change perspective at times<n>like these.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the tip. I think I'll try to get<n>the
fragrance oil another time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you trying to say? That I'm<n>not taking
this seriously enough?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Plow on through? I wonder if that'll<n>work. I could
barely take a step as it<n>was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph, but I really don't want to give<n>up. I want
to do something to make<n>my relative feel better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try again, and this time,<n>I'll stand my
ground! Thanks for the<n>encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to let that snide<n>comment slide... I'll
bulldoze right<n>through them, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that, she heads straight back<n>into the
crowded store.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober emerges triumphantly<n>with the
fragrance oil in hand. I hear<n>her murmur, "I hope
McQueen likes<n>this," before hurrying away.
